## Checklist

- [ ] I tested this locally with `npm run dev`
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] If schema changed, `supabase/schema.sql` is updated
- [ ] If new env vars, `.env.example` + `SETUP.md` are updated
- [ ] No secrets / API keys committed
- [ ] Anti-hookup AI moderation still triggers where it should (if touching message/profile copy)
